name: CF Energy Corp.
summary: CF Energy Corp. operates as an integrated energy provider and natural gas distribution company in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through four segments: Pipeline Natural Gas Sales and Liquefied Natural Gas Supply Distribution Sales; Vehicle Refueling; Natural Gas Direct Transmission; and Renewable and Smart Energy/Integrated Smart Energy. The company distributes pipeline natural gas to users in the ceramic industry base of Xiangdong district, Pingxiang City, Jiangxi province; and operates two refueling stations in Sanya and Changsha, which provide refueling services for vehicles, such as household cars, taxicabs, buses, and trucks. It also transports natural gas via its 2.0 kilometers of pipeline; and develops the Haitang Bay Integrated Smart Energy and the Meishan integrated district energy distribution projects. The company was formerly known as Changfeng Energy Inc. and changed its name to CF Energy Corp. in April 2019. CF Energy Corp. was founded in 1995 and is based in Markham, Canada.
